perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long, wavy brown hair, wearing a white lace bridal dress, is captured in a close-up shot, smiling and moving her hand rhythmically near her face. (2) The camera zooms out to reveal three other women standing behind and beside her; one in a light green sleeveless top and two others in black outfits. (3) All four women begin a synchronized sequence of cute poses, including making heart shapes with their hands, waving, and swaying together with happy facial expressions in a brightly lit indoor space.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, rhythmic electronic pop track begins immediately with a steady percussion beat and a catchy melodic hook. (2) The music continues at a consistent tempo throughout the duration of the clip; no spoken vocals or narration are detected. (3) The track maintains its energy with layered synthesizers until the end of the segment, with no significant ambient noise or sound effects.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative/Hook Text: "新娘與她的伴娘們" (The bride and her bridesmaids). The tone is celebratory and introductory, clearly defining the relationship between the people on screen.
